# Football {#sec-foot .unnumbered}

## Metrics {#sec-foot-met .unnumbered}

-   [**Success Rate**]{style="color: #009499"} is:
    -   1st Down: Gain $40\%$ of yards to go.
    -   2nd Down: Gain $60\%$ of yards to go.
    -   3rd/4th Down: Gain $100\%$ of yards to go (convert).
    -   **Standard Downs**: First downs, second-and-7 or less and third- or fourth-and-4 or less
